app.name: ec
app.one_liner: A terminal-native 3-way Git merge conflict resolver with diff3 base support and vim-like TUI workflow.

screens.name: Conflict Resolver
screens.purpose: Display three-way merge panes and enable conflict resolution via keyboard navigation and selection.

rust_commands.name: backup_merged_file
rust_commands.purpose: Create a backup copy of the original conflicted file before saving resolution.

rust_commands.name: list_conflicted_files
rust_commands.purpose: Scan current Git repository for files with merge conflicts and return a selectable list.

rust_commands.name: resolve_conflict
rust_commands.purpose: Process a merge conflict file using diff3 output and apply user-selected resolutions.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic keybindings for chunk selection
week 1: Integrate git merge-file diff3 parsing
week 1: Support save and exit with file write
acceptance_tests: Missing base chunk (e.g., from add/add conflict) does not crash the resolver and handles gracefully.
No-args mode correctly lists conflicted files and allows user to pick one for resolution.
Non-interactive mode exits cleanly and returns appropriate status code for CI use.
Tool successfully resolves a merge conflict with available diff3 base and produces correct merged output.
